notes: SHIP v1.14.321 - WHOLESALE bottom-nav replacement (Option C, icon-forward) per owner-approved handoff HANDOFF-nav-option-C.md ('go' in chat). Replaces the .159 reactor-rail flex nav with a 4-column CSS grid that structurally cannot wrap. MARKUP: each nav item + EXIT gains an inline <svg class=bicon> icon; all ids/onclick/aria unchanged (showMode, .active toggle, rd_holdGesture(#rd-exit), rd_freeze, #rd-freeze-curtain all UNTOUCHED - layout only, no JS change); 'Crash Cart' label shortened to 'Cart' (spec choice - one-word revert if owner wants it back). CSS: #rd-botnav display:grid repeat(4,1fr); #bn-rail display:contents (its 3 tabs become direct grid cells); #bn-core (sliding reactor rail) retired display:none; .btick display:none; labels hidden by default (opacity:0;max-height:0) and revealed ONLY on the .active tab (icon glows cyan); EXIT always red + always labeled (its .317 red), arming still flips to gold; existing body.rd #rd-exit hold/charge/arming + .rd-exit-charge rules KEPT. 3 DEVIATIONS from the draft (draft-spec bug fixes per CLAUDE.md, reported here): (1) kept #rd-botnav display:none default + added body.rd #rd-botnav{display:grid} so ?legacy stays byte-identical (draft's unconditional display:grid would have shown the nav in legacy); (2) kept position:fixed;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:40;overflow:hidden + the v1.14.287 FIX-2 transform:translateZ(0) GPU layer on #rd-botnav (draft dropped them - would have unpinned the nav AND reintroduced the B-01 dead-nav-in-Crash-Cart iOS-scroller bug); (3) EXIT color #ff5a4d directly instead of var(--red,#ff5a4d) because the live --red is #ff453a (a different red) - keeps EXIT matching its .317 glow. Also removed the now-conflicting body.rd #bn-rail{...flex...} rule (would out-specify display:contents and collapse the 4-cell grid to 2). Gates: brace balance, all 4 inline <script> blocks compile, sw.js compiles, triple .320->.321 lockstep, CRLF working tree preserved. ?legacy=1 byte-identical (nav display:none in legacy). Browser-verified @360/390/1440: 4 even cells no wrap/overflow, inactive=icon-only, active reveals label+cyan glow, EXIT red+labeled, hold-to-exit charges+freezes, legacy nav hidden. NOTE this REPLACES the .320 B nav (label-shrink + EXIT 1/2in) - Option C supersedes it: deletes the reactor rail, hides inactive labels, EXIT is now an equal 4th tab (NOT set-apart). DEVICE-VERIFY (John, phone + laptop): 4 icons in one even row no wrap at phone width; tap Command/Work/Cart switches pages + shows that label; EXIT red with label, hold still freezes; ?legacy=1 unchanged. NEXT: N-12 phase stepper (backlog).
